title: Alliant Energy (LNT) Rides on Clean Portfolio Focus, Investments
text: Alliant Energy (LNT) is expected to further benefit from its initiative to strengthen and expand its infrastructure. Clean assets will help serve its expanding customer base.

title: Alliant Energy: A Solid Utility Play To Ride Out The Coming Economic Uncertainty
text: Alliant Energy is a midsized regulated electric and natural gas utility serving Wisconsin and Iowa. The company enjoys stable cash flow and pays a high dividend yield of 3.58%. Alliant Energy plans to invest $8.5 billion in its infrastructure to grow its rate base and earnings per share.

title: Alliant Energy Corporation (LNT) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:LNT ) Q2 2023 Results Conference Call August 4, 2023 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Susan Gille - Manager of IR John Larsen - Chairman and CEO Lisa Barton - President and COO Robert Durian - Executive VP and CFO Conference Call Participants Dariusz Lozny - Bank of America Alex Mortimer - Mizuho Securities James Kennedy - Guggenheim Operator Good morning, and welcome to Alliant Energy's Conference Call for Second Quarter 2023 Results. This call is being recorded for rebroadcast.

title: Alliant Energy (LNT) Q2 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Fall Y/Y
text: Alliant Energy's (LNT) second-quarter 2023 earnings increase year over year. The company's retail electric customers grow during the same period.

title: Alliant Energy (LNT) Beats Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: Alliant Energy (LNT) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.64 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.59 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.63 per share a year ago.

title: Alliant Energy (LNT) to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Alliant Energy's (LNT) second-quarter earnings are likely to have benefited from systematic capital investments and lower O&M expenses.
